<!--
  Hero image — background-removed version of the previous profile's hero.
  Generated by rembg (U2Net) from the original, committed locally so it ships with the repo.
  Transparent PNG reads cleanly on both dark and light GitHub themes.
-->
<div align="center">
  <img src="./assets/hero-transparent.png" alt="profile hero" width="766"/>
</div>

<!--
  Animated terminal intro — 20s looped SMIL SVG that simulates a terminal
  session: prompt → `cat profile.yaml` (8 yaml fields type in sequentially)
  → `git log --all --oneline | head -3` (with one redacted commit signaling
  private work) → `clear` → empty cleared terminal → loops.

  Tokyo Night palette, JetBrains Mono. Self-contained client-side animation,
  no hosted service dependency.

  Replaces the previous H1 + H3 + bullets + Daft Punk Octocat combo. The
  terminal IS the intro now; the octocat would visually compete with a big
  animated block.
-->
<div align="center">
  <img src="./assets/terminal.svg?v=2" alt="m2moiz terminal session. Hello, World! — moiz here. I work on computer vision, generative AI, and robotics/IoT, mostly where they overlap." width="760"/>
</div>

<p>
  <a href="https://github.com/m2moiz"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" alt="GitHub"/></a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/m2moiz/"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-0A66C2?style=for-the-badge&logo=linkedin&logoColor=white" alt="LinkedIn"/></a>
  <a href="https://x.com/M2Moiz"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/X-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=white" alt="X"/></a>
</p>

-->

<!--END_SECTION:wakabadge-->

### 🦉 When I ship

<!--
  The reference profile renders a WakaTime "time of day" card here showing Morning/Daytime/Evening/Night
  commit counts with horizontal bar chart and percentages. Produced by the anmol098/waka-readme-stats Action.
  Until activated, the block below stays empty.
-->

<!--START_SECTION:waka-->
📊 **This Week I Spent My Time On**

```text
⌚︎ Time Zone: Europe/Paris

💬 Programming Languages:
Python        19 hrs 6 mins   █████████░░░░░░░░░░░░░   42.22 %
TypeScript    9 hrs 12 mins   ████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   20.36 %
C++            7 hrs 2 mins   ███░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   15.54 %
Shell         2 hrs 37 mins   █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    5.79 %
CMake         2 hrs 11 mins   █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    4.83 %
Makefile      1 hrs 28 mins   █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    3.24 %
Dockerfile    1 hrs 12 mins   █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    2.66 %
YAML          0 hrs 54 mins   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    1.98 %
JSON          0 hrs 37 mins   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    1.37 %
Markdown      0 hrs 29 mins   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    1.06 %
Git Config    0 hrs 13 mins   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    0.49 %
Rust          0 hrs 13 mins   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    0.47 %

🔥 Editors:
VS Code           37 hrs 21 mins   ██████████████████░░░░   82.58 %
Neovim             3 hrs 28 mins   ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    7.66 %
Android Studio     2 hrs 17 mins   █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    5.04 %
Xcode               2 hrs 8 mins   █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    4.71 %

💻 Operating System:
Mac           27 hrs 30 mins   █████████████░░░░░░░░░   60.83 %
Arch Linux    17 hrs 43 mins   █████████░░░░░░░░░░░░░   39.17 %
```

🌞 **I'm Most Productive at Night**

```text
🌞 Morning     5 commits   ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░    7.63 %
🌆 Daytime    15 commits   █████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   21.24 %
🌃 Evening    24 commits   ████████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   34.31 %
🌙 Night      26 commits   ████████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   36.81 %
```

📅 **I'm Most Productive on Tuesday**

```text
Monday       11 commits   ███░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   15.18 %
Tuesday      12 commits   ████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   17.56 %
Wednesday    11 commits   ███░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   15.62 %
Thursday     11 commits   ████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   16.03 %
Friday       11 commits   ███░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   14.82 %
Saturday      7 commits   ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   10.02 %
Sunday        8 commits   ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░   10.76 %
```

<!--
  Quote banner — custom SVG at assets/quote.svg.
  Types in once on page load (~6s), then a cursor blinks forever at the end.
  Tokyo Night blue (#7AA2F7) matches the snake dark-mode palette.
-->
<div align="center">
  <img src="./assets/quote.svg?v=2" alt='"Every year in tech brings me one step closer to a mountain, a flock of goats, and no Wi-Fi." ~ m2moiz' width="800"/>
</div>

<!--
  Snake animation of your GitHub contribution graph.
  Generated daily by .github/workflows/snake.yml (Platane/snk) and committed to the `output` branch.
  The <picture> swap gives dark/light-mode variants.
-->
<picture>
  <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m2moiz/m2moiz/output/github-snake-dark.svg"/>
  <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: light)" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m2moiz/m2moiz/output/github-snake.svg"/>
  <img alt="Snake animation eating my GitHub contribution grid" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/m2moiz/m2moiz/output/github-snake.svg"/>
</picture>
